meta.title: Zentral | The Operational Platform for SMBs in Peru & LATAM
meta.description: Centralize HR, tasks, documents, inventory, and accounting in one platform. No Excel. No chaos. From $79/month.

hero.subtitle: HR, tasks, documents, inventory, accounting & AI. All connected. No Excel. No WhatsApp. No chaos.
hero.microcopy: No credit card required. Ready in 5 minutes.

problem.title: 68% of SMBs operate with broken tools.

cards.title: Excel + WhatsApp + Drive
cards.description: Scattered data, manual errors, hours lost copying information between tools.

cards.title: Limited accounting software
cards.description: Only handles invoicing, but doesn't manage tasks, teams, documents, or operations.

cards.title: Complex & expensive ERPs
cards.description: Odoo takes 3-6 months to implement. SAP costs +$40K/year. They need consultants.

cards.title: Disconnected tools
cards.description: A CRM here, a task manager there, payroll somewhere else. Nothing talks to each other.

problem.marketData: The cloud ERP market for SMBs in LATAM reaches USD $2.81B

solution.title: One platform for your entire operation.
solution.subtitle: Zentral integrates everything your business needs to operate, grow, and compete in one place.

customization.title: It adapts to your business, not the other way around.
customization.subtitle: Choose your color. Customize your interface. Zentral becomes your platform, with your identity.

comparison.title: Zentral vs. the competition.
comparison.footer: $199/month with 10 users included — 20% cheaper than Odoo, 46% cheaper than Zoho, 34% cheaper than Monday.

pricing.title: Simple pricing. No surprises.
pricing.promo: 20% off on annual billing. First 50 customers: 25% off the first year.

reasons.title: Truly all-in-one
reasons.description: Not 50 apps duct-taped together. A unified platform where every module communicates natively.

reasons.title: Integrated Drive & docs
reasons.description: No external Google Drive needed. Your storage lives inside Zentral, connected to every process.

reasons.title: Operational AI
reasons.description: A 24/7 analyst, not a chatbot. Analyzes your operation, suggests improvements, and automates repetitive tasks.

reasons.title: Customizable
reasons.description: Your color, your Zentral. Every business has its identity. Your platform should reflect it.

reasons.title: Fast implementation
reasons.description: Weeks, not months. No consultants, no endless projects. Configure and start working.

reasons.title: Affordable pricing
reasons.description: Enterprise functionality, SMB pricing. From $79/month with everything you need.

trust.quote: We built Zentral because SMBs deserve tools as powerful as those of large enterprises, but without the complexity or the price.

cta.title: Your business deserves more than fragmented tools.
cta.subtitle: Zentral is the complete operational platform for SMBs in Peru and Latin America.

footer.tagline: The operational platform for SMBs in LATAM.
